candidates.why: Two separate 'Depreciation' rows appear, but no COGS/cost of sales/cost of revenues parent row was selected in the earlier mapping. The first depreciation row sits with 'Exploration and evaluation expenses', not with a COGS bucket. With no selected COGS reference bucket, there is no clear operating COGS-related D&A to add separately.

variables.notes: COGS final_choice from the prior step is empty, and the visible depreciation rows relate to exploration/evaluation or to the G&A breakdown rather than to any selected COGS bucket.

candidates.why: A 'Depreciation' row appears within the detailed breakdown immediately beneath 'General and administrative' alongside items such as salaries, directors fees, marketing, and stock-based compensation. This strongly suggests it is a component nested inside the selected parent row 'General and administrative', so adding it separately would likely double count.

Another 'Depreciation' row appears near 'Exploration and evaluation expenses', above the G&A section. Its placement suggests it belongs to exploration/evaluation activity rather than SG&A, so it should not be added to XSGA.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is 'General and administrative'. The depreciation row within that section appears to be a sub-component of the selected parent total, not a same-level separate add-on. The other depreciation row appears tied to exploration/evaluation, not SG&A.
